[[OpenLieroX]] is itself a [[Liero clone]]. Liero was the name of the original game.

* [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liero Liero in Wikipedia]
* [http://comser.liero.org.pl/wiki/index.php?title=Liero Liero in the original Liero wiki]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323190227/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Liero -->
